summary: The available literature does not provide sufficient evidence comparing adenoma detection rates specifically between MiraLAX and Golytely; instead, it emphasizes their similar efficacy in bowel preparation overall. Therefore, based on current findings, neither formulation has been shown to significantly improve adenoma detection over the other.
